{{Quote|This is Bravo Four. I'm picking up a wave of enemy tanks approaching from the crater entrance.|Bravo 4|<ref name="Clone Wars" />}}
'''Bravo 4''' was a [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|Clone trooper pilot]] who served in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Bravo 4 piloted one of three [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tanks]] that composed [[Bravo Squadron (Republic)|Bravo Squadron]]. The unit was led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. They saw action during the [[Battle of Thule]].

==History==
With [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces rapidly converging on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], Bravo Squadron was deployed on its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] via an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] along with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Anakin Skywalker with the task of disabling a [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary]] [[Sivvi shield generator complex|shield]] protecting Thule, denying the Republic any entry until it could be destroyed. The taskforce was detected by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] upon landing, in which a [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] promptly appeared and began to deploy multiple craft.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

As [[Heavy Artillery Gun]]s opened fire on the assault ship, numerous [[Ground Armored Tank]]s and [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droids]] began to enter the area, engaging Skywalker and his squadron. With enemy artillery posing a serious threat to the hull integrity of the ship, Skywalker moved to engage them—including their escorts of [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AATs]] and [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|Spider walkers]]. When the area was cleared, a convoy of [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transports]] disembarked with a contingent of [[clone engineer]]s en route to the generator complex.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

Now piloting an [[All Terrain Experimental Transport|AT-XT]], Skywalker mobilized his Squadron to escort the convoy. The group encountered additional waves of spider walkers, tanks, and [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] before [[Convoy 1|one of the transports]] succumbed to artillery fire from a distance. Bravo 4 held his position to defend the remaining transports while Skywalker moved to eliminate the enemy units ahead. Now on the move, the group engaged additional units before the convoy approached the perimeter of the complex. With the complex breached, Bravo 4 remained outside to guard against possible attacks from the rear while Skywalker assaulted the compound. Thanks to Bravo 4's efforts, Skywalker was successful in lowering the shield, completing the first phase of the mission.<ref name="Clone Wars" />
